title: Unexpected Internal Error with Delim join - binding index out of range
description:
### What happens?

Dear DuckDB Developers,

I have encountered an unexpected crash. I would greatly appreciate it if you could take a moment to review the behavior.

Please kindly understand that I will disclose my name and affiliation after some time. I hope this does not bother you, and Let's make concerted effort in improving DuckDB.
```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT);

SELECT * FROM t2, t1, ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_1, t1.c0 AS col_2) as subQuery0 INNER JOIN t0 ON ((subQuery0.col_2)) CROSS JOIN (SELECT t0.c0 AS col_1);
```
```console

```

### To Reproduce

```sql
CREATE TABLE t0(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 INT);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 INT);

SELECT * FROM t2, t1, ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_1, t1.c0 AS col_2) as subQuery0 INNER JOIN t0 ON ((subQuery0.col_2));
-- execute successfully

SELECT * FROM t2, t1, ( SELECT t2.c0 AS col_1, t1.c0 AS col_2) as subQuery0 INNER JOIN t0 ON ((subQuery0.col_2)) CROSS JOIN (SELECT t0.c0 AS col_1);
-- crash with INTERNAL Error: Delim join - binding index out of range
```

### OS:

MacOS

### DuckDB Version:

DuckDB v1.4.0-dev918 (Development Version) 049b11bfee

### DuckDB Client:

CLI

### Hardware:

_No response_

bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t0(c0 Int32, c1 String);
CREATE TABLE t1(c0 Int32, c1 Float32);
CREATE TABLE t2(c0 Int32, c1 UInt8 DEFAULT 1);

SELECT * FROM t2, t1, (SELECT t2.c0 AS col_1, t1.c0 AS col_2 FROM t2 JOIN t1 ON t2.c0 = t1.c0) AS subQuery0 INNER JOIN t0 ON (subQuery0.col_2) CROSS JOIN (SELECT t0.c0 AS col_1 FROM t0 WHERE c1 IS NOT NULL);
key_bug_features: Delim join - binding index out of range
